title: The World Reacts to Wano
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Buggy, Marines, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Mihawk as New bounties and the Cross Guild reshape the world after Wano, while the Straw Hats sail away from the closed country.
scene: New bounties and the Cross Guild reshape the world after Wano, while the Straw Hats sail away from the closed country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And this is the flyer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...you had them send out, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You sure stand out, Mr. President.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not what it looks like! I didn't mean for this to happen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If it wasn't deliberate, then explain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Owee!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It wasn't me, I swear!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My employees just love me too damn much!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was as surprised as anyone when I saw it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey, what's with that fyer?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't stop myself from giving you the top-billing, boss!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Huuuh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've already sent it out to every corner of the world!:)

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: This buggy Character- Ter...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In addition to being a mastermind of the mass escape from Impel down...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: navy ho

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was also a member of the pirate King's Crew!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's how he formed a close bond with one of the emperors, red hair.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And now reports confirm that crocodile came to his aid at Emptee Bluffs Island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our tapping divisions have also verified that crocodile and Mikawk made contact.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their new 'Marine hunting' movement has already gotten financial backing from a number of shady organizations.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When you factor in all the rebellious we're already dealing with...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This cross Guild is undoubtedly a massive threat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What Bounties are we issuing for these three?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with everything in mind, the former warlord, crocodile...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: has earned a whopping $1,965,000,000 bounty for his mighty login ability and cunning guile!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His fellow former warlord, Hawkeye Mihawk, has even greater sword skills than the red-haired emperor!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's worth $3,59,000,000!! A fitting total for the world's greatest swordsman!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: As for buggy the Bombastic clown,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Considering his formidable pedigree...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and the fact that he got these two to yield to his authority....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've given him a bounty of $3, 189,000, 000!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Making him one of the two newly recognized emperors along with straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world government considers him an extremely dangerous individual!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An Emperor, huh? You've certainly made a name for yourself, clown.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Sputter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Splutter!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry! Let me luck your boots!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Shut it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Eek!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All things considered, we could take a different angle here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Having him take all the heat as a figurehead may not be the worst idea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I, for one, have no interest in the title of emperor...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So long as I'm able to live in peace.

summary: This part advances the Post-Wano World Shift through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
